                <span style={{display: "block", position: "static", width: "291.492px", height: "16px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: ""Inter var", "Inter var Fallback", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"", fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "500", lineHeight: "16px", textAlign: "start", letterSpacing: "-0.024px", color: "rgb(98, 98, 98)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderStyle: "solid", borderColor: "rgb(98, 98, 98)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>
                  JPG, GIF or PNG. Recommended size is 256x256px
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>

                    Used
                  </dt>

                  </dd>

              </p>
            </div>
            <div style={{display: "flex", position: "static", width: "133.703px", height: "28px", marginLeft: "179.82px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: ""Inter var", "Inter var Fallback", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"", fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "18px", textAlign: "start", letterSpacing: "-0.026px", color: "rgb(32, 32, 32)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderStyle: "solid", borderColor: "rgb(32, 32, 32)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>
              <button style={{display: "flex", position: "static", width: "133.703px", height: "28px", padding: "6px 10px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", justifyContent: "center", alignItems: "center", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "0", fontFamily: ""Inter var", "Inter var Fallback", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"", fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "500", lineHeight: "19px", textAlign: "center", color: "rgb(253, 253, 253)", whiteSpace: "nowrap", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgb(220, 62, 66)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderWidth: "1px", borderStyle: "solid", borderColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", borderRadius: "9999px", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>
                Delete workspace
              </button>
            </div>
          </header>
        </section>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}
